_review: DRAFT — pending author review. The nuance beat: §18 exception identified, conditions unmet → blocked with cited path (negative-citation pattern).
mintNote: USDG mainnet mint (Token-2022) — DISPLAY-ONLY reference; no devnet mint exists. Never transactable in the demo.
issuerName: Paxos Digital Singapore Pte. Ltd. (MAS MPI)

pathwayBasis.summary: A foreign issuer is not a permitted issuer (§2(12)); §18(a) exempts it from the §3 prohibition only upon Treasury comparability, OCC registration, US reserves.

statusBasis.reference: Treasury GENIUS Act Implementation ANPRM, FR Doc. 2025-18226 (Sept 19, 2025)
statusBasis.summary: No Treasury comparability determination for Singapore/MAS exists as of this registry version; §18(a) conditions are not currently satisfiable — blocked.

reserveBasis.summary: A qualifying foreign issuer must hold reserves in a US financial institution sufficient to meet US customers' liquidity demands, absent a reciprocal arrangement.

redemptionBasis.reference: MAS single-currency stablecoin framework (Singapore, finalized Aug 2023)
redemptionBasis.summary: USDG redemption is governed by Singapore's MAS stablecoin framework; GENIUS §4(a)(1)(B) binds permitted issuers and does not apply to a §18 foreign issuer.
